source.principle: Owl Carousel banner across v1.x and v2.x. v1.x: '* jQuery OwlCarousel v1.3.3' (project was 'jQuery OwlCarousel', one word). v2.x: '* Owl Carousel v2.3.4' (renamed, two words). Generalised per CLAUDE.md §9: same signal shape, absorbable variations are the optional 'jQuery ' prefix and the separator between Owl and Carousel (space or none).

citations.label: v1.3.3 live-fetched 2026-05-21 from hstatic.net (deployed copy; canonical 1.x repo no longer hosted)
